datasetAgreementGeneral: The National Cancer Registry of Pakistan follows ICMJE, PMC, and HEC guidelines for all types of dataset misconduct. In case of misconduct the corresponding user will be required to give an explanation on demand and the matter may be referred to the HEC disciplinary committee.
term1: You acknowledge that this dataset is intended solely for cancer research, clinical studies, and related academic purposes.
term2: You agree not to use this dataset for any commercial, non-research, or unauthorised purposes.
term3: You must properly attribute the original data providers and contributors in all publications, presentations, and reports.
term4: You accept full responsibility for ensuring the ethical use of this dataset in compliance with all institutional and governmental regulations.
